title: The City of God
author: Augustine of Hippo
tradition_notes: Augustine of Hippo is the foundational patristic theologian of Western Christianity. This is the Marcus Dods translation (1871), preferred over Project Gutenberg for markup quality.
source_edition: Standard Ebooks edition, Marcus Dods translation (CC0 editorial work, public domain text)
notes: 22 books grouped into Part 1 (Books 1-10) and Part 2 (Books 11-22). part-1.xhtml and part-2.xhtml are containers with no body content.
